text.title: tech-debt-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for tech-debt-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Conflating code smells with debt: every TODO or long function gets flagged as high-severity debt.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without a business-impact filter the register becomes noise; require concrete evidence (incident IDs, churn data, slow-query logs).

failure-mode.description: Severity inflation: LLMs default every item to "high".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require concrete impact metrics or automatically downgrade to "medium"; every "high" must cite an incident ID or quantified cost.

failure-mode.description: Phantom debt: agent invents items in code it never read.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force the agent to cite file:line and verify file existence; reject items without a resolvable path.

failure-mode.description: Mixing TODO with debt: TODO != debt.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Filter on "has business impact" and "would not exist if redone today"; TODOs are implementation notes, not cost items.

failure-mode.description: Stale references: debt items pointing at moved or renamed files.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Run a weekly link-check pass to verify all file:line references are still resolvable.

failure-mode.description: Recursive debt: "Refactor the debt tracker itself" loops.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cap recursion depth in the loop.

failure-mode.description: Human checkpoint: letting an autonomous agent merge a debt-payoff PR.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The rewrite risk is high; require human review on the pre-merge gate.
